_about: PROTECTED default drone powertrain — snapshot of sitl_copter. k_thrust derived through AP's full output path (docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) from MOT_THST_HOVER 0.35, MOT_THST_EXPO 0.65, SPIN 0.15-0.95: u_hover=0.56, kT=(1.5*9.81/4)/0.56² = 11.73 N. Battery/motor/prop fields are catalogue placeholders for the future power model (stored, not yet consumed).

_doc.pwm_min: Minimum PWM in microseconds. Must match MOT_PWM_MIN in params.parm.
_doc.pwm_max: Maximum PWM in microseconds. Must match MOT_PWM_MAX in params.parm.
_doc.k_thrust: Motor thrust coefficient in Newtons: T = k_thrust * throttle².
_doc.k_torque: Motor reaction torque coefficient: Q = k_torque * throttle².
_doc.motor_time_constant_s: First-order motor thrust lag, seconds. STORED for the drone plant (instant response today) — the VTOL plant already consumes it.
_doc.rotational_damping: Rotational damping N·m/(rad/s). Stored for the drone plant.
_doc.drag_coeff: Linear body drag coefficient in N/(m/s), applied to translational velocity.
_doc.battery_cells_s: Battery cell count in series (S). Stored for the future battery/endurance model.
_doc.battery_capacity_mah: Battery capacity in mAh. Stored placeholder.
_doc.battery_voltage_full_v: Fully charged pack voltage (4.2 V/cell). Stored.
_doc.battery_internal_resistance_ohm: Pack internal resistance in ohms. Stored.
_doc.hover_current_a: Total hover current draw, A. Stored placeholder.
_doc.motor_kv: Motor KV rating (RPM/V). Stored placeholder for a generic 1.5 kg quad.
_doc.motor_max_current_a: Motor maximum continuous current, A. Stored.
_doc.esc_max_current_a: ESC continuous current rating, A. Stored.
